message:
feat(fcp-host): add output capture + connector installer types, fix health clippy

output_capture.rs: RingBuffer ring buffer for bounded stdout/stderr capture,
OutputCapture with JSON line parsing, InstallStatus/InstallOptions/InstalledConnector
types for connector installation lifecycle, VerificationStatus/InstallResult
with step-based audit trail.

health.rs: const fn fixes for is_healthy, is_ready, and threshold accessors.

136 new tests in output_capture, all 1830 fcp-host tests pass, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
